headline: JPMorgan lifts FedEx to Overweight ahead of freight spin-off
summary: Investing.com -- JPMorgan upgraded FedEx to Overweight from Neutral on Wednesday, raising its price target to $460 from $432, as the bank's analysts said the stock offers an attractive opportunity ahead of a pivotal period for the logistics giant.

headline: 2 Reasons to Buy FedEx Stock Now, According to J.P. Morgan
summary: On Wednesday, J.P. Morgan analyst Brian Ossenbeck boosted his rating of FedEx stock to Buy from Hold.  FedEx stock jumped 2.8% to $411.20 after the open Wednesday, while UPS stock rose 1.2% to $103.32.  Ossenbeck has a positive of the view of the company heading into the spinoff of its freight business, expected next week, and before its fiscal-fourth-quarter results on June 23.
